title: Two-phase WebSocket parse (probe @type, dispatch manually) is correct for serde 1.x
description: The decision to NOT use serde internally-tagged enums for WebSocket dispatch (and instead use concrete structs with a @type field and manual dispatch) avoids a known serde 1.x limitation: #[serde(other)] does not work inside #[serde(tag = '...')] internally-tagged enums. A contributor might suggest 'clean this up' with an enum — resist it unless serde 2.x fixes the limitation.
